last_prompt: Add unit and integration tests for the webhook notification system. In cli/src/notifier.rs or a separate test module, use a mock HTTP server (wiremock or httpmock crate, or a simple tokio TCP listener) to verify: (1) a POST request is sent to each configured URL on task status change, (2) the JSON payload contains the correct task id, status, and timestamp fields, (3) a webhook failure (connection refused) logs a warning but does not propagate an error. Run `cargo test` to confirm all tests pass.
